fields.original_string: private static final long MIN_INCOMPLETE_INTEGER = Long.MIN_VALUE / 10;
private final char[] buffer = new char[BUFFER_SIZE];

methods.source_code:
@SuppressWarnings("fallthrough")
  private boolean isLiteral(char c) throws IOException {
    switch (c) {
    case '/':
    case '\\':
    case ';':
    case '#':
    case '=':
      checkLenient(); // fall-through
    case '{':
    case '}':
    case '[':
    case ']':
    case ':':
    case ',':
    case ' ':
    case '\t':
    case '\f':
    case '\r':
    case '\n':
      return false;
    default:
      return true;
    }
  }
